tasks.subject: Fix NPM authentication config for NODE_AUTH_TOKEN
tasks.description: Update docs/NPM_TOKENS.md and TODO.md to explicitly instruct the user to configure `~/.npmrc` with `//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=\${NODE_AUTH_TOKEN}` so that NPM actually reads the environment variable injected by `oprun`.

tasks.subject: Automate .npmrc configuration for NPM Automation Token
tasks.description: Update the interactive setup wizard (`packages/1password-cli-tools/bin/setup.js`) to automatically configure `~/.npmrc` with `//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=\${NODE_AUTH_TOKEN}` if the user chooses to configure an NPM Automation Token. This prevents EOTP errors during publishing.

tasks.subject: Fix SSH agent and 1Password shell tools on reboot
tasks.description: Investigate why the 1Password SSH agent integration failed and the 1Password CLI tools were not available on reboot, then fix the shell configuration and scripts.

tasks.subject: Improve UI and instructions for op-session-manager
tasks.description: Update `op-session-manager.sh` to provide a clearer UI during sign-in, explaining that it might take a moment, offering the option to skip with Ctrl+C, and notifying the user that they can run `opon` later to reload the session.
